diagnosis.final_diagnosis: Atrial fibrillation with rapid ventricular response (RVR) and right upper lobe/right middle lobe lung collapse
diagnosis.diagnostic_reasoning: The patient presented with worsening dyspnea and chest discomfort and was found to have atrial fibrillation with rapid ventricular response. Imaging studies indicated complete collapse of the right lung and new findings concerning for exacerbation of lung cancer, which combined with the history of non-small cell lung cancer led to the diagnosis.
